title: Macro-hardening for Layer1 softmax-rowwise r4 Nangate45 seed

task.objective: Harden the selected row-wise SOFTMAX seed (`softmax_rowwise_int8_r4_wrapper`) into a reusable Nangate45 macro view so Layer2 can consume dedicated descriptor-level SOFTMAX without allow_wrapped_io exceptions.

commands.name: harden_softmax_macro
commands.run: python3 npu/synth/pre_synth_compute.py --platform nangate45 --src_verilog_dir runs/designs/activations/softmax_rowwise_int8_r4_wrapper/verilog --module softmax_rowwise_int8_r4_wrapper --id softmax_rowwise_int8_r4_wrapper_ng45_macro --out_root runs/designs/npu_macros --clock_period 6.0 --clock_port clk --place_density 0.45 --make_target generate_abstract --tag_prefix l1_macro_softmax_rowwise_r4_ng45 --manifest_param source_variant=softmax_rowwise_int8_r4_nangate45_base --manifest_param evaluation_scope=macro_hardened

acceptance: Macro hardening appends at least one status=ok row in runs/designs/npu_macros/softmax_rowwise_int8_r4_wrapper_ng45_macro/metrics.csv
Candidate softmax_rowwise_int8_r4_nangate45_base is promoted from wrapped_io to macro_hardened with a valid macro_manifest path
Committed artifacts stay lightweight (macro manifest, macro metrics, candidate manifest only)

handoff.pr_title: eval: macro-harden Layer1 softmax-rowwise r4 Nangate45 seed
checklist: Commit only lightweight artifacts and metadata
Move this item from queued/ to evaluated/ and fill result
Include macro metrics row references (param_hash/tag/result_path) in result.metrics_rows
Replace handoff.pr_body_fields placeholders before moving the item to evaluated/
